was a senior international [figure skating competition](/wiki/Figure_skating_competition "Figure skating competition") held in September 2017 in [Oberstdorf](/wiki/Oberstdorf "Oberstdorf"), [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany"). It was part of the [2017–18 ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/2017%E2%80%9318_ISU_Challenger_Series "2017–18 ISU Challenger Series").[[1]](#cite_note-Announce-1) It also served as the final [qualification event](/wiki/Figure_skating_at_the_2018_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Qualification "Figure skating at the 2018 Winter Olympics – Qualification") for the [2018 Winter Olympics](/wiki/Figure_skating_at_the_2018_Winter_Olympics "Figure skating at the 2018 Winter Olympics"). Medals were awarded in the disciplines of [men's singles, ladies' singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dance](/wiki/Ice_dance "Ice dance").

The **2017 CS [Nebelhorn Trophy](/wiki/Nebelhorn_Trophy "Nebelhorn Trophy")** was a senior international [figure skating competition](/wiki/Figure_skating_competition "Figure skating competition") held in September 2017 in [Oberstdorf](/wiki/Oberstdorf "Oberstdorf"), [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany"). It was part of the [2017–18 ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/2017%E2%80%9318_ISU_Challenger_Series "2017–18 ISU Challenger Series").[[1]](#cite_note-Announce-1) It also served as the final [qualification event](/wiki/Figure_skating_at_the_2018_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Qualification "Figure skating at the 2018 Winter Olympics – Qualification") for the [2018 Winter Olympics](/wiki/Figure_skating_at_the_2018_Winter_Olympics "Figure skating at the 2018 Winter Olympics"). Medals were awarded in the disciplines of [men's singles, ladies' singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dance](/wiki/Ice_dance "Ice dance").
